description: PIIFilter Detection Recall Benchmark Dataset — 2365 labeled examples covering 26 entity types. Expanded from original 150 examples to 2365 for statistical significance. Includes adversarial variants (obfuscated/encoded/zero-width) for EMAIL, PHONE, SSN, CREDIT_CARD, URL, and IP_ADDRESS types.

SSN-like: 987654321 is just a long number, not an SSN (no dashes).

Domain: 123 is not a valid domain name by itself.
Path: tmp/foo/bar is relative, not absolute, so not a FILE_PATH.
Base64 encoded SSN: MTIzLTQ1LTY3ODk= in base64, detectors should not decode this
